problem id: d452141e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11001101 -> 10011001
  01111010 -> 11110101
  00101000 -> 01010000
  01101101 -> 11011011
  11011100 -> 10111011
  00110010 -> 01100100
  01001101 -> 10011011
  11100010 -> 11000111
  11110001 -> 11100001

query: 01111101
predicted answer: 11111011
